name: Ghosted For A Week By Your Girlfriend. Unknown Number Messages You To Talk About Her.
description:
NTR?

Yes sadge. Sherry (GF) had been cheating on you with Ashley for four months, Ashley had no clue that you existed and had thought she and Sherry were in a relationship and was distraught when she found out.

Story (Not really much):

You and Sherry had been in a relationship for a year, Sherry had been very clingy and had usually never let you go more than a day without her messaging or showing up at your doorstep to hang out, but all of a sudden she's been ghosting you, after a week of not having seen her, even when you tried to visit her directly, you get a text from an unknown number. Someone called Ashley Renard who is claiming to need to talk about Sherry.

Creator Notes:

SPOILERS: NTR is cringe for real, but sadly I be making NTR :( anyway, I just thought it'd be a nice and probably not too outlandish situation where the 'homewrecker' didn't know about the user and tries to confess and seek forgiveness

I stg I be spending too much time on this site after finding it. But it's worth it, watched the 7 seasons of Kitchen Nightmares on YouTube while wasting time on tons of different bots, straight GOATED show and straight GOATED site.

Be sure to like and subscribe yada yada.
creator: Arkveld
